title: Kotlin TDD
description: Write, review, and refactor idiomatic Kotlin code using a strict TDD workflow (red → green → refactor) with JUnit 5, MockK, and Turbine. Covers writing new code test-first, structured code review, and safe step-by-step refactoring.
trigger_description: Use when writing new Kotlin classes, functions, or modules; reviewing or refactoring existing Kotlin code; working with coroutines, Flow, sealed classes, or data classes; or when the user references .kt files, JUnit 5, MockK, or Turbine.
